title: Revert opening load sequence and add controls to start screen

requirements.text: Revert the InitialLoadingScreen component to the original Bond-themed gun barrel loading animation and intro sequence, removing any extended duration changes introduced in recent versions. Restore the original minimum display time, animation timing, and visual elements.

quotes: resort back to the opening load out

acceptanceCriteria: InitialLoadingScreen displays the original Bond-themed gun barrel animation without extended timing modifications
The loading screen minimum display time is restored to its original value (not the extended 007 intro duration from recent versions)
All original scan-line overlay, progress bar, and corner accent decorations are present
The transition from the loading screen to the start/mission page matches the original behavior

requirements.text: Add a controls reference panel to the start/mission screen that displays the game controls (WASD movement, mouse aim/shoot, Space to jump or interact, and any other relevant keybindings) so players can see them before starting the game.
acceptanceCriteria: The start/mission screen displays a clearly labeled controls section listing all player keybindings (WASD, mouse look, shoot, space)
The controls panel is styled consistently with the existing James Bond / Die Hard black, charcoal, and gold theme
The controls panel does not obstruct the 'Begin Mission' call-to-action button
Controls are readable at desktop resolutions and do not break the layout

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the game instructions content that was kept in the previous iteration
Keep the James Bond / Die Hard visual theme intact across all modified components
nonGoals: Extending or further modifying the gun barrel animation duration
Changes to in-game HUD or gameplay logic
